Events and Concerts

Upcoming Events

The concert and performance calendar

  • 14Jun

    Spring Concert

    📍 Piazza Libertà, Turriaco — 8:30 PM

    The traditional open-air spring concert with a programme ranging from classical music to great film soundtracks. Free admission.

  • 22Jun

    Corpus Domini Procession

    📍 Parish Church, Turriaco — 10:00 AM

    Musical accompaniment to the Corpus Domini procession through the streets of the village.

  • 5Jul

    Music Festival — Student Recitals

    📍 Palamarson, Turriaco — 6:00 PM

    Year-end performance by the Society's music course students. Student recitals followed by the full band concert.

  • 15Aug

    Ferragosto Concert

    📍 Villa comunale, Turriaco — 9:00 PM

    Traditional open-air summer musical evening. Repertoire of light music, operetta, and film soundtracks. Free admission.

  • 12Oct

    Autumn Concert

    📍 Palamarson, Turriaco — 5:00 PM

    Indoor autumn concert featuring a programme of European band music and original compositions.

  • 22Nov

    Saint Cecilia — Musicians' Feast

    📍 Parish Church, Turriaco — 10:30 AM

    Celebration of the patron saint of music with Holy Mass and a dedicated concert.

  • 21Dec

    Christmas Concert

    📍 Palamarson, Turriaco — 5:00 PM

    Christmas concert with a traditional repertoire. Possible collaboration with the "Tita Michelàs" Band of Fiumicello.

Recent Events

Past events of the season

5 April 2026

Easter Procession

Musical accompaniment to the Easter procession in Gorizia, in collaboration with other bands of the province.

22 March 2026

Notes of Peace — Holy Mass

Participation in the concert and Mass for Peace with the "Tita Michelàs" Band of Fiumicello.

6 January 2026

Epiphany Concert

Traditional Epiphany concert in collaboration with friends from the Fiumicello Villa Vicentina Band.

21 December 2025

Christmas Concert 2025

The Christmas Concert was held at Turriaco's Palamarson with a programme of Christmas and classical music.

Società Filarmonica di Turriaco

Founded in 1870, the Società Filarmonica di Turriaco is one of the most traditional wind bands in Friuli Venezia Giulia. Member of ANBIMA FVG.
